roadmap.title: Project Foundation
outcomes: Set up linting, formatting, and testing

roadmap.title: Smart Contracts
outcomes: Create unit tests for contract behavior

planner.role: Break work into milestones and tasks
rules: Always provide a 3-7 step plan for non-trivial tasks
Modify only files required for the task
Do not introduce breaking changes without explicit note
Keep code style and naming consistent with existing files
Check logic, edge cases, and security impact
Run lint, test, and build when available
Do not claim success without command output

prompting: Be explicit about task goal, constraints, and acceptance criteria
Reference concrete files and functions whenever possible
Prefer short, deterministic prompts over broad requests
coding: Follow project lint and formatter rules
Add comments only for non-obvious logic
security: Never commit secrets or private keys
Treat wallet signing and tx submission as sensitive flows
Validate external input and chain/network assumptions
git: Never rewrite history unless explicitly requested
Do not include unrelated file changes in commits

definitionOfDone: Feature behavior matches requested acceptance criteria
